title: Korak 15

challengeFiles.name: script

solutions.name: script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imate izjavu console u svom kodu.
Vaša izjava console treba da loguje niz "Well, it was nice to talk to you. Have a nice day!".

description:
Za poslednji korak, logovaćete poruku bota od "Well, it was nice to talk to you. Have a nice day!" u konzolu.

I time, vaš bot za pozdravljanje je završen!
